title: ZazaWeaponPack
description: adds some custom 3d model weapons and items that can be obtained by renaming items
body:
Works only with OptiFine!!! https://optifine.net

Adds 8 custom weapon models. For proper viewing, it is recommended to use https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames or similar mods.

For those who don’t want to download mods or check the resource pack files, here’s a list of item names and compatible items:

Biba – all vanilla swords + wooden axe

Dragonslayer – all vanilla swords

Pika of Light – all vanilla swords

Rusty Katana – all vanilla swords

Soul Splitter – all vanilla swords

sword1 – all vanilla swords

Benihime – all vanilla swords

Lightning Axe – all vanilla axes(have an animated texture)

The resource pack also includes various features, such as unique item displays in the off-hand, when dropped, in item frames, and even in the head slot. To place weapons in the head slot, you need to use commands, plugins, or mods.
